items.title_en: AI will drive Nvidia higher by more than 40% from here, says Wells Fargo
items.title_zh: 富国银行表示，人工智能将推动 Nvidia 股价上涨 40% 以上
items.desc_en: The bank, which has an overweight rating on the chipmaker, raised its price target on the stock.
items.desc_zh: 该银行对这家芯片制造商给予增持评级，并提高了该股的目标价。

items.title_en: Canvas hack: company pays criminals to delete students' stolen data
items.title_zh: Canvas 黑客：公司付钱给犯罪分子，让他们删除学生被盗的数据
items.desc_en: The company behind Canvas says it has "reached an agreement" with the hackers who disrupted thousands of colleges and universities.
items.desc_zh: Canvas 背后的公司表示，它已经与扰乱数千所学院和大学的黑客“达成协议”。

items.title_en: EBay rejects GameStop's audacious $56 billion takeover bid
items.title_zh: eBay 拒绝 GameStop 560 亿美元的大胆收购要约
items.desc_en: EBay on Tuesday rejected an ambitious $56 billion takeover bid from the much smaller ⁠GameStop on doubts over the financing of the deal.
items.desc_zh: eBay 周二拒绝了规模小得多的 GameStop 雄心勃勃的 560 亿美元收购要约，原因是对该交易的融资存疑。

items.title_en: Texas accuses Netflix of spying on users, including children
items.title_zh: 德克萨斯州指控 Netflix 监视用户，包括儿童
items.desc_en: The lawsuit comes amid increased scrutiny over platform features like auto-play that deliver endless content to users.
items.desc_zh: 此次诉讼发生之际，人们对自动播放等向用户提供无尽内容的平台功能进行了越来越严格的审查。

items.title_en: What's at stake for trade, Taiwan and Iran in Trump's high-risk summit with China's Xi
items.title_zh: 特朗普与中国习近平的高风险峰会对贸易、台湾和伊朗有何利害关系
items.desc_en: China experts expect Trump and Xi may announce trade deals or other agreements, such as a Chinese purchase of U.S. agricultural products or Boeing aircraft.
items.desc_zh: 中国专家预计特朗普和习近平可能会宣布贸易协议或其他协议，例如中国购买美国农产品或波音飞机。

items.title_en: Amazon accelerates delivery race with 30-minute dropoffs in dozens of U.S. cities
items.title_zh: 亚马逊在美国数十个城市推出 30 分钟送达服务，加速配送竞赛
items.desc_en: Amazon has been gradually speeding up its delivery windows, after getting customers hooked on two-day and next-day shipping.
items.desc_zh: 在让顾客迷上两天和次日送达后，亚马逊逐渐加快了送货时间。

items.title_en: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗停火是“巨大的生命支持”
items.desc_en: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".
items.desc_zh: 美国总统批评伊朗提出的结束战争的还价，并表示为期一个月的停火“软弱得令人难以置信”。

items.title_en: Redistricting war isn't over, Democrats say as Jeffries calls a meeting this week
items.title_zh: 杰弗里斯本周召开会议，民主党人表示选区重新划分战争尚未结束
items.desc_en: Democrats are vowing to fight on after being dealt a series of blows in the partisan fight to redraw congressional maps ahead of the 2026 midterms.
items.desc_zh: 民主党人在 2026 年中期选举前重新绘制国会地图的党派斗争中遭受一系列打击后，誓言要继续战斗。

items.title_en: US passengers from ship quarantined as officials say public risk 'very low'
items.title_zh: 官员表示公共风险“非常低”，船上的美国乘客被隔离
items.desc_en: One passenger has tested positive for Andes virus, a rare type of hantavirus, while another is showing mild symptoms, health officials say.
items.desc_zh: 卫生官员称，一名乘客的安第斯病毒检测呈阳性，这是一种罕见的汉坦病毒，而另一名乘客则表现出轻微症状。

items.title_en: 'Britain at the heart of Europe': How Starmer's plans are going down in the EU

items.desc_en: Sir Keir Starmer pledged to rebuild the UK's relationship with Europe in a defiant speech on Monday.
items.desc_zh: 凯尔·斯塔默爵士在周一的一次挑衅性演讲中承诺重建英国与欧洲的关系。
